subject: New: Claude + Codex courses are here
body:
Денис, OpenAI Codex & Claude ecosystem courses have been added to the Educative catalog.

Денис, your new courses are here

Build agentic AI skills using OpenAI & Anthropic

*Note: You are receiving this platform-related update because you have an active Educative account. If you wish to unsubscribe from product or other updates related to your account, you can do so anytime.

NEW COURSE

Mastering OpenAI Codex for Agentic Coding

Start Learning → (https://learn.educative.io/e3t/Ctc/RG+113/cz5H404/VXf03Y5zNq0nW4LYX-c2KRyQyW2lg-cV5MWRKDN2L_pyH5m_5PW5BWr2F6lZ3pxW5WHxhT8R63lgW1G7bjT8Ys3nlN47ch623ns92W2891x-6GdX9cW33dq4617vfTjW3ZQfBD46wD7YW5ltCZp8KXWj7W1zt1-r1wQ-rMW4l69X_1t4T31VXW34Q7kQxYsW5p0Nj03zYm2rW2PTJHg5Fsw7wW5-DlC95dLpmgN2mk8G5D80c8W2PJKbY1cnrkGW2xHjnT4-ksTgW5MslZ51-GdpbW6Wd0k72Dq521W2Xc5B77-Yd99W2ZGmQ94hbFw4W4rTHCQ5ZJc7ZW3WyqX83WJBL4VBZ9gq8vgJKMV20Rmw62YpdVW18Q-js2QKYk3W429hcX4z7YBPW1lVPyk61jFy_W7gdf-R16McqqW66wytv8BnWVnN4Cbw1mGJFNyVT2PMc6SsfsGW7NRQrf5MHjnhW8Lcbgr10fQ5fW5hCb_C6Q-TXkf8wQ_GY04 )

Learn how to use OpenAI Codex to delegate multi-step development tasks through an agentic workflow. Go from basic CLI setup to building a full Flask application using AGENTS.md files, Skills, Automations, and MCP servers.

NEW COURSE

Claude Everywhere: The Complete Ecosystem Guide

Start Learning → (https://learn.educative.io/e3t/Ctc/RG+113/cz5H404/VXf03Y5zNq0nW4LYX-c2KRyQyW2lg-cV5MWRKDN2L_pBs3prCCW95jsWP6lZ3nyW2DcPSd6T64pRW6BsKc61zbyZmW7GYL-H7sT-6BW6-2vpl6yNNxCW1V0Nr294DtWDN8f7z27wdq6GW5VQxNK3VFMRrW7Vkt8x4Wp3JQW8pbkn_8JrMPtW5jpKKv5BS6ydW1TF9Ty1DG2rwW4LGdkp30mZZNW2kryhb50yzHZW6-Ry405m5t3fW34HFfB8T8P1vW82Z0Rs9jdzXWW8J3FNt4nNbF0N3sWjssqb-xlVJ09zr3HktGHW6bvlWX5Q2fJ2W5gj2-n7XXRR9W1RJMFs1CP7YYW1pRG4l5R0lbNW3rdb9Y5DTmM6N8_FmTDfnJpZN59gWJtWqNc0W5csT8t5Wt4lxW4g9-8B8XygztW1NZJlV60CSd_VjTddl5Mn8bLf53bX4404 )

Learn how to use Claude's full ecosystem — from Claude.ai and Desktop to Cowork and MCP — to build a personalized workflow for writing, research, data analysis, and multi-step task delegation.
